---
name: Spec Feedback
about: Report an ambiguity, gap, inconsistency, or error in the DIFP specification
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: spec-feedback
assignees: ''
---

**Section reference**
Which section(s) of the spec does this feedback relate to? (e.g. Section 3.2, Section 7.3)

**What the spec currently says**
Quote or summarize the relevant text.

**The problem**
What is ambiguous, missing, inconsistent, or incorrect?

**Suggested resolution**
How would you fix or clarify it? (Optional — observations without solutions are still valuable.)

**Impact**
- [ ] Blocking — I cannot implement a conformant node without this resolved
- [ ] Significant — causes ambiguity that leads to incompatible implementations
- [ ] Minor — wording or clarity issue only

---
